allow: Bash(node -e "const s1=require\('./scenarios.json'\); const s2=require\('./whitebox-scenarios.json'\); const fs=require\('fs'\); fs.writeFileSync\('scenarios.json', JSON.stringify\([...s1, ...s2], null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s1=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); const s2=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('whitebox-scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); fs.writeFileSync\('scenarios.json', JSON.stringify\([...s1, ...s2], null, 2\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./scenarios.json'\); console.log\('Total scenarios:', s.length\); console.log\('Whitebox scenarios:', s.filter\(x=>x.id.startsWith\('whitebox'\)\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=require\('./scenarios_pool/scenarios.json'\); const wb=s.filter\(x=>x.id.startsWith\('whitebox'\)\); console.log\('共有', wb.length, '个白盒测试用例:\\n'\); wb.forEach\(\(x,i\)=>console.log\(\(i+1\) + '. ' + x.id + '\\n   模块: ' + x.module + '\\n   优先级: ' + x.priority + '\\n'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scenarios_pool/scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); const wb=s.slice\(97,100\); wb.forEach\(x=>console.log\('ID:', x.id, '\\n模块:', x.module, '\\n优先级:', x.priority, '\\nSetup步骤:', x.setup?.length || 0, '\\nAPI调用:', x.steps.filter\(s=>s.action==='api.request'\).length, '\\n数据库断言:', x.assertions.filter\(a=>a.type==='db'\).length, '\\n---'\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const s=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('scenarios_pool/scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Total scenarios:', s.length\); console.log\('First 3 IDs:', s.slice\(0,3\).map\(x=>x.id\)\); console.log\('Last 3 IDs:', s.slice\(-3\).map\(x=>x.id\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const s1=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); const s2=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('whitebox-scenarios.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Original:', s1.length, 'Whitebox:', s2.length\); const merged=[...s1, ...s2]; console.log\('Merged:', merged.length\); fs.writeFileSync\('scenarios.json', JSON.stringify\(merged, null, 2\)\); console.log\('Saved to scenarios.json'\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('reports/latest-report.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('测试总结:'\); console.log\('- 总计:', r.summary.total\); console.log\('- 通过:', r.summary.passed, '✅'\); console.log\('- 失败:', r.summary.failed, '❌'\); console.log\('\\n白盒测试结果:'\); const wb=r.scenarioReports.filter\(x=>x.scenario.id.startsWith\('whitebox'\)\); console.log\('- 白盒用例总数:', wb.length\); console.log\('- 白盒通过:', wb.filter\(x=>x.classification==='passed'\).length\); console.log\('- 白盒失败:', wb.filter\(x=>x.classification!=='passed'\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const r=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('reports/latest-report.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('测试总结:'\); console.log\('总计:', r.summary.total\); console.log\('通过:', r.summary.passed, '✅'\); console.log\('失败:', r.summary.failed, '❌'\); const wb=r.scenarioReports.filter\(x=>x.scenario.id.startsWith\('whitebox'\)\); console.log\('\\n白盒测试:'\); console.log\('总数:', wb.length\); console.log\('通过:', wb.filter\(x=>x.classification==='passed'\).length\); console.log\('失败:', wb.filter\(x=>x.classification!=='passed'\).length\);")
